events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need parse scenario. Task: choose correct tool/material/method for overcurrent device selection & coordination commercial project. Stage staged. Scenario says selected tool and material package matches size, rating, application on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized. Reference NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C). Need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since staged parts match and no defects, decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage staged. Component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete maybe 0 because staged not begun? Could be 0. Value 0. Sound_source empty string? Required fields. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. Findings empty? Could include no findings. Actions maybe none needed. Rationale. References NEC 240 etc. Need ensure valid JSON.
